title: SWIMMING LOCATIONS - 211info
text: PRINEVILLE POOL SWIMMING LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a public swimming space. 399 NE Garner Prineville, OR 97754 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days a week 1:15pm-3:15pm (541) 447-7546 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 447-7546 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: In district: $5 per person Out of district: $8.75 per person DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Crook County Services: Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
